series_metadata.series_description: All records concerning federal grants to state agencies which document the expenditure of federal monies. Can include, but may not be limited to, grant applications and supporting documentation, financial reports and monitoring reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 3 biennia plus current year (total 8 years) and until audited by State Auditor, audit report released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 biennia plus current year (total 8 years) and until audited by State Auditor, audit report released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
